constraint.description: The clock radio SHALL trigger an alarm when the current time equals the configured alarm time while the system is in `Radio AUTO` mode.
constraint.rationale: The automatic mode exists so the device can remain quiet until the scheduled wake-up condition occurs.

constraint.description: In `Radio AUTO` mode, the ringing state SHALL return to silent after an alarm timeout of 59 minutes.
constraint.rationale: The wake-up function should not leave the device ringing indefinitely after the alarm has been triggered.

constraint.description: The clock radio SHALL receive radio waves from the external transmitter and decode them into radio signals using the current frequency setting.
constraint.rationale: The user expects the device to transform incoming radio transmission into an internal signal usable for playback.

constraint.description: The clock radio SHALL broadcast radio sound to the user from radio signals, alarm input, activation, and volume level.
constraint.rationale: The radio path and the alarm path both exist to produce audible output that the user can hear.

constraint.description: The clock radio SHALL support the operating modes `Radio OFF`, `Radio ON`, and `Radio AUTO`, with transitions triggered by the `radio off`, `radio on`, and `radio auto` events.
constraint.rationale: The owner wants explicit user-selectable radio behavior rather than a single fixed playback mode.
